title: KpiTileWidgetConfig
description: Config for sandbox.kpi-tile — a big-number summary tile with optional trend badge and inline sparkline.

x-atlas-presets.label: Trend up
x-atlas-presets.description: Headline metric trending up. Green arrow + supporting label.

x-atlas-presets.label: Trend down
x-atlas-presets.description: Headline metric trending down. Red arrow + supporting label.

x-atlas-presets.label: No trend badge
x-atlas-presets.description: Plain headline number with no trend annotation.

label.title: Label
label.description: Caption rendered above the value (e.g. "Active tenants").

value.title: Value
value.description: Headline figure. Numbers are accepted as strings — format them yourself before assigning.

unit.title: Unit
unit.description: Optional unit appended to the value (e.g. %, req/s, MB).

trend.title: Trend direction
trend.description: Trend arrow + color. Blank hides the trend badge entirely.

trendLabel.title: Trend label
trendLabel.description: Display text for the trend badge, e.g. "+5.2% vs. last week". Only meaningful when a trend direction is set.

sparklineValues.title: Sparkline values
sparklineValues.description: Comma-separated numeric series rendered as an inline sparkline beneath the value. Leave blank for no sparkline.
